tree.name: Grant Williams
tree.tradeDescription: Hornets traded PJ Washington, 2024 2nd (BOS own, #55 Ariel Hukporti), and 2028 2nd (least favorable) to Mavericks for Grant Williams, Seth Curry, and 2027 1st (DAL own, protected). Charlotte also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: PJ Washington
assetsGivenUp.note: Kentucky forward, Hornets drafted him 12th overall in 2019
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted by Hornets with 12th overall pick in 2019 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#55) via BOS
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Celtics as part of Gordon Hayward sign-and-trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally BOS own pick, acquired in Hayward S&T. Sent to DAL in PJ Washington trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own 2022 2nd-round pick, sent to Boston in Hayward S&T. Did not convey per BBRef.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick (least favorable)
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own future 2nd-round pick, sent to Dallas in PJ Washington trade
